title: Help the Travelers
description: Help a weary couple find shelter in crowded Bethlehem.

steps.instruction: Ask the innkeeper for a room.
Find a clean blanket near the market.
Prepare the stable with the clean blanket.
Lead the travelers to the prepared stable.

reflection.message: The promised King enters the world in a place most people would overlook.

title: The Shepherds' Message
description: Meet the shepherds and follow their joy toward the manger.

reflection.message: The first announcement is given to ordinary workers keeping watch at night.

title: Follow the Star
description: Help travelers from the East understand the road through Bethlehem.

steps.instruction: Speak with the traveler from the East.
Observe the star from the village edge.

reflection.message: Those who seek with humility are drawn toward worship and wonder.

title: Go See the Infant Jesus
description: Return to the stable and witness the newborn child with reverence.

steps.instruction: Go see the Infant Jesus in the stable.

reflection.message: The journey leads not to power or spectacle, but to humble worship before the child.
